flashcards.definition: Insulin (↓glucose) and glucagon (↑glucose) maintain blood sugar within a narrow range.
PTH raises Ca²⁺; calcitonin lowers Ca²⁺; vitamin D aids absorption.
Released when dehydrated; causes kidneys to reabsorb more water, concentrating urine.
Response reduces the original stimulus; primary mechanism for hormonal regulation.
Maintenance of stable internal conditions despite external changes.
